summary_one_line: Input must be routed to the UTF16LE decoder and contain a 16-bit code unit whose top six bits equal the 0xD800 high-surrogate pattern.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A byte stream that (a) is detected/handled as UTF-16LE so control reaches UTF16LEToUTF8, and (b) contains a little-endian 16-bit code unit c with (c & 0xFC00) == 0xD800 (a high surrogate, low byte 0x00-0xFF, high byte 0xD8-0xDB), reached while the conversion while-loop is still running.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive_ngram4 resolved 10/10 trials and drove the branch true 37 times (T=37 vs L T=0), reaching depth-1 lines 534-545 that only the winner explores; the winning seeds carry a UTF-16 BOM-like prefix and 0x00-interleaved bytes (e.g. ff fe ff at 0x0b-0x0d, and 3c 00 3f 00 patterns) that produce surrogate-range code units inside UTF16LEToUTF8.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Plain naive resolved only 1/10, was blocked 8/10 with T=0 F=149 at the blocker and never entered lines 534-545; its single blocking seed is mostly ASCII/0x20 runs that never form a 0xD8xx little-endian code unit.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: naive_ngram4 folds the last 4 edge IDs into the map index, so a previously-unseen 4-edge path through the conversion loop registers as new coverage; this finer-grained reward retains the intermediate corpus states that progressively build the surrogate-producing byte arrangement that plain edge coverage saturates on and discards.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A 16-bit code unit c reaching the comparison (c & 0xFC00) == 0xD800, i.e. a value whose top six bits move toward the 0xD800 constant; satisfying it requires the masked operand to equal 0xD800 exactly.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolved 9/10 and drove the branch true with the highest hitcount (96 vs loser 4); the integer-CMP at line 533 is intercepted into the CMP_MAP, so inputs whose (c & 0xFC00) value is closer to 0xD800 add a new distance bucket and are kept, gradient-climbing to the exact match.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Plain naive has no CMP_MAP, so an input that gets c & 0xFC00 near but not equal to 0xD800 yields no new edge and is discarded; naive stayed blocked 8/10 with branch true count 0 and average hitcount 4.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile adds an integer-CMP interception writing a (PC, operand-distance bucket) entry into the CMP_MAP; a Hamming-distance-closer (c & 0xFC00) vs 0xD800 pair is preserved as corpus, giving a gradient toward the equality that naive's plain edge feedback cannot sense.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the UTF-16LE high-surrogate test in UTF16LEToUTF8.
naive_ngram4 resolved every trial while naive was mostly blocked.
The loser naive resolved only one trial and was blocked in eight.
Only the winner explores the surrogate-decoding lines 534-545 below the blocker.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 534  T=25 F=12  T=0 F=0  if (in >= inend) {           /* handle split mutli-byte c...

evidence_trail.claim: At the blocker the winner takes true 37 times while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 533  T=37 F=735  T=0 F=149  if ((c & 0xFC00) == 0xD800) {    /* surrogates */  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winning seeds carry a UTF-16 byte-order-mark-like prefix and 0x00-interleaved code units.
The loser-blocking seed is dominated by ASCII space runs that cannot form a 0xD8xx code unit.
naive_ngram4 indexes the coverage map by a length-4 edge path so a new path tuple is new coverage.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
a "new
bucket" is a previously-unseen 4-edge path tuple.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile resolved nine trials and reached the highest branch hitcount.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=96  loser=4

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile intercepts integer CMPs into a CMP_MAP keyed by operand-distance bucket.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
each CMP callback writes into a `CMP_MAP` keyed by (PC, operand-distance
bucket)

evidence_trail.claim: A closer-to-matching CMP operand pair adds a CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile uses naive's mutators with no I2S substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Two decisive pairs span ngram_coverage (naive_ngram4) and value_profile; neither winner is cmplog/vpc so I2SRandReplace is not claimed and no lineage query is mandatory. The dominant pair for the schema's single claimed_mechanism slot is the value_profile CMP_MAP gradient; the prompt's value_profile MECHANISM CONTEXT explicitly states 'No I2SRandReplace', so an I2S-floor lineage check is not applicable here.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic UTF16LEToUTF8-style harness gated on (c & 0xFC00)==0xD800 where value_profile and naive_ngram4 resolve at the same rate as plain naive, showing neither CMP_MAP distance feedback nor 4-edge n-gram coverage gives an advantage on this surrogate gate.

weakest_evidence_point: Attributing the naive_ngram4 win specifically to 4-edge path coverage (rather than to incidental extra corpus diversity) is the least directly evidenced claim, since no mutation_op lineage was inspected for the n-gram seeds.
